name: Haricots Verts, Belgian Endive and Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 heads Belgian endive, cut crosswise into
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until just crisp-tender, about 2 minutes.
2. Drain the green beans well.
3. Pat the green beans dry.
4. Transfer the green beans to a large bowl. Add mushrooms and endive.
5. In a small bowl, mix together white wine vinegar and Dijon mustard.
6. Gradually add olive oil to the mixture in the small bowl, stirring continuously.
7. Mix in sliced chives.
- The salad can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover the vegetables and refrigerate. Let the dressing stand at room temperature before using.
8. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and toss gently to coat evenly.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
Notes: If haricots verts, the pencil-thin French green beans, are not available, use the thinnest regular green beans you can find.
